vllm.title: Implement `single_query_cached_kv_attention` kernel
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds the single_query_cached_kv_attention kernel.
Supported data types:

half
float

Tested models:

OPT-125M
OPT-350M
OPT-1.3B
OPT-2.7B
OPT-6.7B
OPT-13B

Tested GPUs:

A100

vllm.title: Use FlashAttention for `multi_query_kv_attention`
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR is to use FlashAttention kernels for multi_query_kv_attention, which performs masked attention for the prompt inputs.
Pros

FlashAttention is fast and memory-efficient.
FlashAttention supports 1D inputs and only invokes a single kernel to handle multiple sequences with variable lengths.

Con
